filename: KeepMeCompany LTD - Data Sharing Agreement Nov 2024.docx
summary: This document is a Data Sharing Agreement template between KeepMeCompany Ltd and NHS GP practices outlining terms for processing patient data via the AI Intake System. It details compliance requirements with GDPR and NHS Data Security Toolkit standards, including security measures like encryption and data minimization protocols. The agreement specifies responsibilities for both parties and includes signature blocks for the CEO and practice administrators.
